creator: mike@sentex.net
text:
More narrowing down. Most of my boxes run with 

security.bsd.see_other_uids=0
security.bsd.see_other_gids=0

I also added the patch from 
https://github.com/openssh/openssh-portable/commit/fff13aaa262b7b3ec83ed21e29674cbf331780a7

which adds the error message. The fatal error now shows


fatal: unable to make the process untraceable: No such process
